## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when workflow behavior changes

## Screenshots

Add before and after screenshots for UI changes.

## Notes

Call out tradeoffs, follow-up work, or areas where reviewer attention would help.
